title: with_xxx_key: deduplicate across 6 key types
description: The with_rsa_key / with_aes_key / with_ecc_p256_key / with_ed25519_key / with_curve25519_key / with_cmac_key methods in rsa.rs, aes.rs, ecc.rs, ed25519.rs, curve25519.rs, cmac.rs are copy-paste identical (generate/cache → save id → call f → key_evict → match result). A single generic free function or macro — e.g. fn with_key<K, F, R>(key: K, id: KeyId, client: &mut Client, f: F) -> Result<R, WolfHsmError> where K: Evictable, F: FnOnce(&K, &mut Client) -> Result<R, WolfHsmError> — would hold the logic once; each with_xxx_key becomes a one-liner delegating to it. Six copies means six places to fix if eviction semantics change.
